name: B-Gaming S.A.
summary: B-Gaming S.A. develops and provides technical solutions for the placement, communication, validation, and processing of large volumes of information. It also installs security computer centers, communications equipment, VSAT antennas, online and mobile lottery terminals, printers, and other supplies. In addition, the company develops communication and transaction management software. It primarily serves lottery institutions. The company was formerly known as Boldt Gaming S.A. and changed its name to B-Gaming S.A. in February 2018. B-Gaming S.A. was founded in 2007 and is based in Buenos Aires, Argentina.
